mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.nickname AS author_name FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post (user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.content, r.created_at, u.nickname AS author_name FROM forum_reply r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reply (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
